overview: AsandraMD specializes in hormone replacement therapy, particularly testosterone replacement using bio-identical hormone pellets that provide steady hormone levels over several months. The clinic also offers peptide therapy, GLP-1 weight loss programs, and anti-aging services.
highlights: Also offers peptides, GLP-1 weight loss, and PRP treatments
Offices in Beverly Hills and Newport Beach
targetAudience: Men experiencing low testosterone symptoms and women seeking hormone replacement therapy.
